sections.name: Executive Summary
sections.purpose: High-level proposal summary and strategic fit

sections.name: Problem Statement
sections.purpose: Current challenges and pain points identified during discovery

sections.name: Technical Architecture
sections.purpose: Proposed solution architecture and technology stack

sections.name: Implementation Timeline
sections.purpose: Phased delivery plan with milestones and dependencies

sections.name: ROI Analysis
sections.purpose: Projected return on investment and cost-benefit breakdown

sections.name: Next Steps & Pricing
sections.purpose: Commercial terms, engagement model, and sign-off process

structure.sequenceRationale: The proposal opens with the Executive Summary to frame strategic fit, then the Problem Statement grounds the discussion in real pain points. Technical Architecture and Implementation Timeline build confidence in the delivery approach. ROI Analysis justifies the investment, supported by optional Case Studies for proof. Next Steps & Pricing closes with clear commercial terms.
